channel.title: Terminal on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Terminal on Arrans github.io

item.title: wavetermdev/waveterm
item.description: An open-source, cross-platform terminal for seamless workflows

item.title: jesseduffield/lazygit
item.description: simple terminal UI for git commands

item.title: termux/termux-app
item.description: Termux - a terminal emulator application for Android OS extendible by variety of packages.

item.title: ayn2op/discordo
item.description: A lightweight, secure, and feature-rich Discord terminal (TUI) client.

item.title: fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
item.description: A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.

item.title: TheZoraiz/ascii-image-converter
item.description: A cross-platform command-line tool to convert images into ascii art and print them on the console. Now supports braille art!

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: MatiasDesuu/ThinkDashboard
item.description: A lightweight, self-hosted bookmark dashboard with keyboard shortcuts.

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: sachaos/viddy
item.description: 👀 A modern watch command. Time machine and pager etc.

item.title: sharkdp/fd
item.description: A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to ‘find’

item.title: jarun/nnn
item.description: n³ The unorthodox terminal file manager

item.title: microsoft/edit
item.description: We all edit.

item.title: veeso/termscp
item.description: 🖥 A feature rich terminal UI file transfer and explorer with support for SCP/SFTP/FTP/S3/SMB

item.title: warpdotdev/Warp
item.description: Warp is the agentic development environment, built for coding with multiple AI agents.

item.title: alacritty/alacritty
item.description: A cross-platform, OpenGL terminal emulator.

item.title: wezterm/wezterm
item.description: A GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer written by @wez and implemented in Rust

item.title: zellij-org/zellij
item.description: A terminal workspace with batteries included

item.title: charmbracelet/vhs
item.description: Your CLI home video recorder 📼

item.title: muesli/duf
item.description: Disk Usage/Free Utility - a better ‘df’ alternative

item.title: ClementTsang/bottom
item.description: Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.

item.title: leo-arch/clifm
item.description: 💾 The shell-like, command line terminal file manager

item.title: gnunn1/tilix
item.description: A tiling terminal emulator for Linux using GTK+ 3

item.title: context-labs/mactop
item.description: mactop - Apple Silicon Monitor Top

item.title: pvolok/mprocs
item.description: Run multiple commands in parallel

item.title: vinibiavatti1/TuiCss
item.description: Text-based user interface CSS library

item.title: GianlucaP106/mynav
item.description: Workspace and session management TUI

item.title: fathyb/carbonyl
item.description: Chromium running inside your terminal

item.title: noborus/ov
item.description: 🎑Feature-rich terminal-based text viewer. It is a so-called terminal pager.

item.title: pterm/pterm
item.description: ✨ #PTerm is a modern Go module to easily beautify console output. Featuring charts, progressbars, tables, trees, text input, select menus and much more 🚀 It’s completely configurable and 100% cross-platform compatible.

item.title: liamg/darktile
item.description: 🌘 Darktile is an experimental/abandoned GPU rendered terminal emulator designed for tiling window managers.

item.title: lusingander/stu
item.description: TUI explorer application for Amazon S3 (AWS S3) 🪣

item.title: directvt/vtm
item.description: Text-based desktop environment

item.title: mrusme/neonmodem
item.description: Neon Modem Overdrive

item.title: TerminalStudio/xterm.dart
item.description: 💻 xterm.dart is a fast and fully-featured terminal emulator for Flutter, with support for mobile and desktop platforms.

item.title: muesli/gitty
item.description: Contextual information about your git projects, right on the command-line

item.title: Delta456/box-cli-maker
item.description: Make Highly Customized Boxes for CLI

item.title: dongyx/hardv
item.description: A Powerful Flashcard Program for Linux, macOS, and Other Unix-like Systems
